title: 🌊 Clearwater
body:
🌲 Mika’s SMP RP 🌍
Step into a fully immersive survival roleplay world where every decision shapes your future. Build, trade, form alliances—or betray them. With a unique economy, weekly mayor elections, jobs, taxes, and over 30 custom laws, Mika's SMP is more than just Minecraft. It’s a living, breathing society. Crime has consequences. Leadership has power. Will you rise, rebel, or survive?
